type.description: Handler type. PromptKit-known types are suggested, but values are not restricted to this list — a different runtime may define additional types.

platform.title: Platform
platform.description: Hyperscaler platform hosting for keyless auth (azure/bedrock/vertex)

assertions.description: Assertions to apply to each assistant message

type.description: Handler type. PromptKit-known types are suggested, but values are not restricted to this list — a different runtime may define additional types.

all_turns.description: Assertions to apply to all assistant messages

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.description: Name of a sandbox declared under spec.sandboxes

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.description: Name of a sandbox declared under spec.sandboxes

defaultLevel.title: Default Level
defaultLevel.description: Default log level for all modules

commonFields.title: Common Fields
commonFields.description: Key-value pairs added to every log entry

transport.title: MCP Transport
transport.description: Explicit transport adapter. Defaults: url→sse for back-compat; command→stdio. Set to 'streamable_http' to opt into the MCP 2025-03-26 Streamable HTTP transport.

source.title: MCPSource Name
source.description: Name of a host-registered MCPSource that provisions the endpoint per scope (e.g. 'docker'). Mutually exclusive with command and url.

scope.title: Source Scope
scope.description: Lifecycle boundary at which the source opens and closes. Required when source is set.

source_args.title: Source Args
source_args.description: Opaque arguments passed to the named MCPSource. Schema is source-specific. See the source's reference for accepted fields.

name.title: Name
name.description: Module name pattern using dot notation (e.g. runtime.pipeline)

fields.title: Fields
fields.description: Additional fields added to logs from this module

type.description: Recording format type hint (auto-detected if omitted)

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: Tool implementation bindings keyed by tool name

evals.title: Evals
evals.description: External eval process bindings keyed by eval type name

sandboxes.title: Sandboxes
sandboxes.description: Named sandbox backends for exec-hook subprocess launch

selectors.title: Selectors
selectors.description: External selector processes narrowing skill and tool candidate sets

tool_selector.title: ToolSelector
tool_selector.description: Name of a selector declared under spec.selectors used to narrow the LLM-visible tool set per turn

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Registered sandbox factory name (direct ships in-tree; docker_run/docker_exec/kubectl_exec are examples)

variables.description: Template variables to inject into the pack

trials.description: Number of times to run this scenario for statistical evaluation

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.description: Name of a sandbox declared under spec.sandboxes

selector.title: Selector
selector.description: Name of a selector declared under spec.selectors

mode.description: Execution mode. One of: 'mock' (use mock_result or mock_template) - 'live' (HTTP via 'http') - 'mcp' (MCP server) - 'exec' (subprocess) - 'client' (client-side handler).

mock_result.description: Static mock response returned regardless of tool-call args. Use when the response does not depend on inputs. Mutually exclusive with mock_template.

mock_template.description: Go text/template rendered against tool-call args (parsed as a JSON map). Rendered output is parsed back as JSON. Use this instead of mock_result when the response should depend on inputs (e.g. branching on order_id with {{ if eq .order_id "X" }}...{{ end }}). Mutually exclusive with mock_result.

title: PromptArena Configuration
description: Main configuration for PromptArena test suites
